body.title: Inference: OllamaSource liveness reflects dispatch-ability, not just socket-ping
body.intention: I intend that local OllamaSource reports available=False when its chat path 404s, so the router never picks a socket-reachable-but-undispatchable local ollama (the ping != dispatch honest-liveness gap).
body.description:
**Split from T-inference-resolve-requests-by-tier (#3 of 3).** Local ollama reports available=True on a socket connect even when its /v1/chat path 404s (model not pulled / endpoint wrong), so route() picks it and the call dies. Liveness must mean dispatch-ability.

**Shape:** OllamaSource.ping()/check_and_update verifies the actual chat/generate path (cheap probe or a models-list check), not just socket.create_connection. A 404/model-absent => available=False, so route() skips it and falls through (now safely, given #1's chokepoint).
**Affected files:** devices/inference/sources.py (OllamaSource.ping / check_and_update / self_test).
**Design rules:** honest liveness; read-only probe; fail-soft (probe error => available=False, never raises into the health loop).
**Scope boundary:** IN — OllamaSource dispatch-aware liveness. OUT — other sources' liveness; the dispatch routing (#1, shipped); hard-error fall-through (#2).
**Test plan:** monkeypatch OllamaSource's probe so the chat path 404s => available=False; a socket-up + chat-200 => available=True.
**Completion criteria:** OllamaSource.available is False when the chat path 404s and True only when a dispatch-shaped probe succeeds; the health loop never raises on probe failure.

body.result: OllamaSource.ping() now probes GET /api/tags (HTTP, read-only) instead of a bare socket connect — a socket-up-but-API-dead/404/empty-models server reads as unavailable so the selector skips it and falls through (safe given the shipped chokepoint). Fail-soft: probe errors → available=False, never raises into the health loop. 6 tests green, proven non-vacuous (hollow always-True ping fails 5/6). 0 regressions.
body.unproven_reason: Additive-test class (same lever as T-proof-emitter-additive-surface-mode): the 6 tests ARE a genuine red→green (a hollow always-True ping fails 5/6) but proof_emitter's diff-inversion strips the new test file. The full behavioral proof (a real socket-up-but-model-absent Hex actually gets skipped) lands in the Phase-A live smoke test.
